<!-- source-snippet repo="scribe" path="docs/user/sdlc-howtos/applications/develop/pqs/index.rst" commit="9066c81716d62cbb879e677d5bec96bb5324891f" snippet="scribe-rst-code-docs-user-sdlc-howtos-applications-develop-pqs-index-sql-109" location="lines:109-113" -->
```sql
   select payload->'token'->'issue'->>'issuer'          as issuer,
          sum((payload->'token'->>'quantity')::decimal) as total_quantity
   from active('TokenOpen')
   group by payload->'token'->'issue'->>'issuer';

```
